title: Howls at the Moon
summary: For brief periods, you become a fearsome and powerful creature with control issues.
tiers: Tier 3: Bigger Beast Form or Greater Beast Form
Tier 6: Lethal Damage or Perfect Control
gm_intrusions: The change happens in an uncontrolled fashion. People are terrified of monsters.
text: For brief periods, you become a fearsome and powerful creature with control issues.
details: For brief periods, you become a fearsome and powerful creature with control issues.
